author: cvuosalo
body:
Up to now, DD4hep workflows have read geometry from XML files. There is now a DD4hep ideal geometry description in the Conditions DB, so a DD4hep workflow that reads geometry from the DB can be created.

Comments are requested as to whether this new workflow in this PR has been implemented correctly.

This PR depends on PR #34344.

#### PR validation:
To be done later

No backport will be done.
title: [RFC][DD4hep] Add DD4hep Run 3 workflow that reads geometry from DB
